dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4883 IS: To amend the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 to increase the civil penalties that may be imposed under that Act.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Kennedy (for himself and Mr. Kim) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 to increase the civil penalties that may be imposed under that Act.

section.header: Increase of civil penalties under Export Control Reform Act of 2018

subsection.text: Section 1760(c)(1)(A) of the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (50 U.S.C. 4819(c)(1)(A)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking twice the value of the transaction and inserting four times the value of the transaction.

subsection.text: This section, and the amendments made by this section, shall apply with respect to a violation of the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (50 U.S.C. 4801 et seq.) or any regulation, order, or license issued under such Act, committed on or after the date of the enactment of this Act.
